description: Wiki maintenance — automated checks and fixes

lint_checks.name: contradictions_between_pages
lint_checks.description: Find pages where old claims are no longer accurate.

lint_checks.name: orphan_pages_detection
lint_checks.note: Runs via scripts/lint.sh — output JSON with count + paths.

lint_checks.name: knowledge_gaps_detection
lint_checks.description: Identify topics mentioned across pages but without dedicated page. Soft-only check.

lint_checks.name: new_sources_available
lint_checks.note: Full check — lint detects → User decides → Ingest processes.

lint_checks.name: new_topics_proposal
lint_checks.description: Suggest new topics from conversation context and index.md connections.

lint_checks.name: date_consistency_check
lint_checks.description: Verify year in date: matches year in '## Updated [YYYY-MM-DD]' sections.

lint_checks.name: text_similarity_scan
lint_checks.description: Scan wiki for n-gram overlap ≥90% — detects copy-paste chains.

lint_checks.name: hot_cache_stale_check
lint_checks.note: If changes detected since last hot.md update → prompt user to refresh.

primary_command.note: Single entry point for all lint checks — do not call helper scripts separately.

agent_read_instructions.rule: Agent MUST read AGENTS.md before executing any lint checks.

post_lint_actions.description: Actions triggered after lint.sh completes — bridges lint findings to user decision and ingest flow.

actions.action: flag_contradiction_pages + present to user for cascade resolution

post_lint_actions.rule: Lint outputs JSON findings → user reviews → user decides → agent executes ingest/update via appropriate process file. Lint never writes wiki directly, only reports.
